message:
feat(fsqlite-core): implement two-phase commit protocol with channel infrastructure (bd-3go.5)

- Add CommitRequest struct modeling transaction writes with page refs and WAL data
- Implement two_phase_commit_channel(capacity) factory creating bounded MPSC channels
  with backpressure for concurrent writer coordination
- Define Permit pattern for acquire → send → release/abort lifecycle ensuring
  resource safety through RAII-style tracking
- Add TrackedSender wrapper that detects leaked permits at runtime (bd-3go.10)
- Implement batch size computation functions: conformal_batch_size for fsync-latency
  conformance, optimal_batch_size for throughput, little_law_capacity for queue sizing
- Include comprehensive test suite covering: reserve/send/abort flows, blocking at
  capacity, cancel safety between reserve and send, FIFO ordering guarantees,
  batch draining semantics, and permit leak detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
